name: voice-request-not-captured-as-business-name
description: Regression from a real transcript: a user mid-website-wizard who says 'Mujh se voice note mein baat karo' had it stored as their business NAME. The global voice interceptor must short-circuit BEFORE the webDev name handler, so the request toggles voice mode instead of becoming field data. State stays at WEB_COLLECT_NAME and no businessName is captured.

turns.user: Mujh se voice note mein baat karo
